case_title: WESTERN UNITED INSURANCE COMPANY VS. FERNANDO GONZALEZ et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF WESTERN UNITED INSURANCE COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT GONZALEZ, FERNANDO DOES 1 TO 25 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR NOV-22-2002 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  SEP-23-2002 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         NOV-07-2002
SUMMONS RETURNED FILED BY PLAINTIFF WESTERN UNITED INSURANCE COMPANY ON DEFENDANT GONZALEZ, FERNANDO
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF WESTERN UNITED INSURANCE COMPANY SERVED AUG-13-2002, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT GONZALEZ, FERNANDO
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $173.50 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT GONZALEZ, FERNANDO
DECLARATION OF MAN CHAN RE:CCP 585(D) FILED BY PLAINTIFF WESTERN UNITED INSURANCE COMPANY
CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT A NONJURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF WESTERN UNITED INSURANCE COMPANY
DECLARATION OF MAN CHAN IN SUPPORT OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF WESTERN UNITED INSURANCE COMPANY
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF NOV-22-2002 CONTINUED TO JAN-10-2003 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT. 212, TO OBTAIN DEFAULT JUDGMENT (S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT (S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WESTERN UNITED INSURANCE COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GONZALEZ, FERNANDO $21,100.00 PRINCIPAL, $173.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $21,273.50, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF DEFUALT JUDGMENT BY COURT. FILED BY ATTORNEY FOR PLAINTIFF, WESTERN UNITED INSURANCE COMPANY.
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF WESTERN UNITED INSURANCE COMPANY
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JAN-10-2003 IS OFF CALENDAR JUDGMENT ENTER. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 25
CERTIFICATE OF FACTS RE UNSATISFIED JUDGMENT ISSUED; FILED BY PLAINTIFF WESTERN UNITED INSURANCE COMPANY
ASSOCIATION OF ATTORNEYS: SUSNOW, ROBERT L ADDED AS ATTORNEY FOR WESTERN UNITED INSURANCE COMPANY
